test.query: SELECT CounterID, EventDate FROM hits_10m_single ORDER BY CounterID LIMIT 4500000 SETTINGS optimize_read_in_order=1 FORMAT Null
SELECT CounterID, EventDate FROM hits_10m_single ORDER BY CounterID LIMIT 4500000 SETTINGS optimize_read_in_order=0 FORMAT Null
SELECT CounterID, EventTime FROM hits_10m_single ORDER BY CounterID, EventTime LIMIT 4500000 SETTINGS optimize_read_in_order=1 format Null
SELECT CounterID, EventTime FROM hits_10m_single ORDER BY CounterID, EventTime LIMIT 4500000 SETTINGS optimize_read_in_order=0 format Null
SELECT * FROM (SELECT CounterID, EventDate FROM hits_10m_single) ORDER BY CounterID LIMIT 4500000 SETTINGS optimize_read_in_order=1 FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM (SELECT CounterID, EventDate FROM hits_10m_single) ORDER BY CounterID LIMIT 4500000 SETTINGS optimize_read_in_order=0 FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM (SELECT CounterID, EventDate FROM hits_10m_single ORDER BY CounterID, EventDate) ORDER BY CounterID LIMIT 4500000 SETTINGS optimize_duplicate_order_by_and_distinct=1 FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM (SELECT CounterID, EventDate FROM hits_10m_single ORDER BY CounterID, EventDate) ORDER BY CounterID LIMIT 4500000 SETTINGS optimize_duplicate_order_by_and_distinct=0 FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM (SELECT CounterID, EventDate FROM hits_10m_single ORDER BY CounterID) ORDER BY CounterID, EventDate LIMIT 4500000 SETTINGS optimize_duplicate_order_by_and_distinct=1 FORMAT Null
SELECT * FROM (SELECT CounterID, EventDate FROM hits_10m_single ORDER BY CounterID) ORDER BY CounterID, EventDate LIMIT 4500000 SETTINGS optimize_duplicate_order_by_and_distinct=0 FORMAT Null
